title: Ubiquiti E7-Campus - UniFi Enterprise E7 Campus UniFi Access Point
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise 7 Campus is a device from the Enterprise series, designed for enterprise environments The outdoor UniFi E7-Campus wireless access point with IP67-rated durability features two Ethernet ports, both supporting POE++ input power (1x GE + 1x 10GE) . With support for the 802.11be (WiFi 7) standard and dual-band WiFi 2.4 + 5 GHz , it offers a total modulation rate of up to 9.3 Gbps * * Maximum modulation rate may vary depending on local regulatory conditions Supports up to 1000+ connected devices Dual-Band WiFi 7 PRISM active RF filtering 1x GE + 1x 10GE (both POE-enabled) for high-availability installations Built-in directional antennas Wireless Mesh, Fast Roaming, Band Steering Real-time spectral analysis Hotspot 2.0 Radius over TLS support UniFi Network Server version 9.0.114 or newer is required to manage the AP UniFi devices are centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server application. The downloadable application is available for Windows / Linux / MAC OS, or a standalone hardware controller can be purchased. The application is also included in selected UniFi routers Device Wall / ceiling mount Pole mount IP67 waterproof kit Mounting kit
